top_signals.title: UK running out of time to boost defense as investment plan stalls, military chief warns
top_signals.summary: Defence Minister John Healey said on Monday that Prime Minister Keir Starmer was determined to publish it before a July 7 NATO summit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Container Ship Sinks Off Batam
top_signals.summary: A Tanzania-registered container ship, Golden Star 1, sank about 6 km off Batam, Indonesia, on June 5 at around 10:30pm local time.The vessel reportedly took on water and subsequently sank. All nine crew members were safely rescued by the Indonesian…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump storms out of interview after being challenged about election fraud claims, DOJ fund
top_signals.summary: The president said he would like to see the weaponization fund proceed despite setbacks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug news and Bitcoin drop to sub-$60K: Is $1.4K next?
top_signals.summary: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Denmark’s Christian Eriksen collapses again during international match
top_signals.summary: Sunday's incident marked the second time the 34-year-old playmaker collapsed to the turf while representing his country.
